text: //26, :44 PM Kisan Parivahan Yojana — State, Gujarat 2026 KPYG Kisan Parivahan Yojana STATE 🎯 Farmer 🎯 Women 🎯 Housing Overview Benefits How to Apply FAQs References Details Kisan Parivahan Yojana: Empowering Farmers in Gujarat The Kisan Parivahan Yojana, initiated by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare, and Cooperation Department of Gujarat, is designed to provide crucial financial support to farmers. This scheme enables them to acquire medium-sized goods vehicles, making the transportation of agricultural products more efficient and cost-effective. Overview of the Kisan Parivahan Yojana The primary objective of the Kisan Parivahan Yojana (िकसान प�रवहन योजना) is to assist farmers in Gujarat by offering monetary aid for the purchase of goods vehicles with carrying capacity ranging between 600 kg and 1500 kg. This initiative intends to streamline the logistics of transporting harvested crops, thereby promoting better market access and reducing transportation costs. Key Benefits of the Scheme Standard of Assistance (For Small, Marginal, Standard of Assistance (For General/Other Name of the Component Women, SC/ST Farmers) Farmers) Medium-sized goods vehicles (capacity of 35% of the total vehicle cost or ₹75,000/-, 25% of the total vehicle cost or ₹50,000/-, 600kg to 1500 kg) whichever is lower whichever is lower https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/kpyg/ /

//26, :44 PM Kisan Parivahan Yojana — State, Gujarat 2026 Note: The minimum time limit for reclaiming benefits is set at years. Eligibility Requirements The applicant must be registered farmer. The applicant must be resident of the state of Gujarat. The vehicle to be purchased should be medium-sized goods vehicle (with capacity of 600kg to 1500kg) acquired from an authorized dealer. Steps to Apply for the Kisan Parivahan Yojana Farmers can apply for the Kisan Parivahan Yojana through an online process. Follow these steps to complete your application: Visit the -Khedut Portal at https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/. On the homepage, click on ‘Schemes’ followed by ‘Agricultural Schemes’. Select the Kisan Parivahan Yojana and click on the ‘Apply’ button to access the application page. Click on the "Apply New" button to submit fresh application. If any corrections are needed, utilize the "Update Application" button to modify your application. Upon completion, confirm your application. Print copy of the confirmed application for your records. Applicants can track their application status or view, print, and upload application details through this link: https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/public/frm_Applicant_Corner.aspx. Note: Applications will be processed on first-come, first-served basis until the target limits are reached. Contact Information For further inquiries or assistance regarding the Kisan Parivahan Yojana, please click here. https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/kpyg/ /
